summary: A modestly recorded show that leans into melancholy with heartfelt Jerry vocals and solid performances of Broken Arrow, Comes A Time and Eyes of the World.
review: The two fan reviews describe a set that’s emotionally resonant – especially Jerry Garcia’s plaintive vocal delivery on several slower numbers – and note a respectable selection of songs such as Broken Arrow, Comes A Time, Eyes of the World and Casey Jones. No concrete details about the recording source or sound quality are given, so the audio is assumed to be serviceable but unremarkable.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers gave above‑average scores (3 and 4 stars) and highlighted several strong song performances, but there is no information on recording fidelity to boost the rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not comment on sound clarity, mix balance, or any audio issues; thus the recording is presumed listenable but not distinguished.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers describe the set list as terrific and emotionally cohesive, leaning toward sad‑soothing material that fits a rainy‑day listening mood.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His voice is described as emotional and heart‑rendering, especially on the slower, sad songs.
